mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, status, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, email, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, status, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, display_name = #{displayName}, status = #{status}, deleted = 0, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, email, display_name AS displayName, status, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM users
deleted = 0
AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id ASC
